mapper.select: SELECT i.id, i.member_id AS member_id, m.nickname AS member_nickname, i.category, i.content, i.reply, i.status, i.created_datetime AS created_datetime, i.updated_datetime AS updated_datetime FROM tbl_inquiry i LEFT JOIN tbl_member m ON i.member_id = m.id WHERE i.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_inquiry SET reply = #{reply}, status = 'ANSWERED', updated_datetime = now() WHERE id = #{id}
